description: Calculate stakeout (replanteo) data in TopoCal using the survey dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\site_points.csv. Compute the azimuth (degrees) and horizontal distance (meters) from the instrument station (Point 1) to target points 5, 12, 18, 25, and 31. Export the results in a tabular format identifying each target point with its computed azimuth and horizontal distance to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\stakeout_report.txt.
